## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

- [ ] `feat` - New feature (minor release)
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix (patch release)
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation only
- [ ] `style` - Code style changes (formatting, etc.)
- [ ] `refactor` - Code refactoring
- [ ] `perf` - Performance improvements (patch release)
- [ ] `test` - Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` - Maintenance tasks
- [ ] `ci` - CI/CD changes
- [ ] `build` - Build system changes

## PR Title Format

This project uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for automatic versioning.

**Format:** `<type>(<optional scope>): <description>`

**Examples:**
- `feat: add new flow visualization` → Minor release
- `fix: resolve parsing error` → Patch release  
- `feat!: redesign API` → Major release (breaking change)
- `docs: update readme` → No release

## Checklist

- [ ] My PR title follows the Conventional Commits format
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally in the Extension Development Host
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style of this project
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if necessary
